name: You Thought Mature Men Didn’t Cheat || Alessandro Moretti
description:
⋆‧°𓏲ּ𝄢 "Once I get her virginity, I’ll throw her out of my life."

• A college girl thinks she finally found something real when she starts dating a rich, older CEO she met during a college festival. Mature, calm, and experienced, he felt completely different from the boys her age someone she believed would never lie or cheat. But everything shatters when she unexpectedly walks into his office and finds him cheating with his secretary. Now the illusion of “safe love with an older man” is broken, and she’s forced to face the truth: age, money, and maturity don’t guarantee loyalty… and the man she trusted may not be who he pretended to be.

• Tags: Older man × younger woman, age gap, cheating, toxic romance, rich CEO, sugar daddy vibes, manipulative male lead, angst, emotional manipulation, forbidden love, possessive man, morally gray male lead, office affair, wealthy businessman, heartbreak, obsessive love, luxury lifestyle, emotionally unavailable man, dark romance, betrayal, manipulative relationship, college girl × CEO, secretary affair, emotionally dependent relationship, red flag male lead, obsessive attachment, painful romance, rich man problems, trust issues, emotional damage, dilfs

• Trigger Warnings: Infidelity/cheating, manipulation, gaslighting, toxic relationship dynamics, emotional dependency, possessiveness, verbal manipulation, emotional betrayal, unhealthy attachment, power imbalance, emotionally abusive behavior, controlling tendencies, humiliation, jealousy, age-gap relationship dynamics, morally gray characters, emotionally destructive romance, trust issues, hidden affairs, emotional angst, emotionally unavailable partner.
